title: CANCER COUNSELING CENTER - 211info
text: KAISER PERMANENTE NORTHEAST REGION MEDICAL GROUP CANCER COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education, psychological support, and individual, child, family, and group counseling. Teaches relaxation, communication, positive image, and goal setting skills for people with cancer and the people that support them. Ongoing grief counseling for families. Open to both Kaiser members and nonmembers. 500 NE Multnomah Boulevard Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Individuals with cancer Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 331-6550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 331-6550 TTY/TTD (800) 735-2900 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling * Cancer General Health Education Programs * Cancer Group Counseling * Cancer Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Cancer Individual Counseling * Cancer Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH ENGAGEMENT AND WELLNESS SERVICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICAL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PATIENT NAVIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KAISER PERMANENTE NORTHEAST REGION MEDICAL GROUP
